# misp_noticelist (Data Source)

Look up a MISP noticelist by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "misp_noticelist" "gdpr" {
  name = "gdpr"
}

output "gdpr_enabled" {
  value = data.misp_noticelist.gdpr.enabled
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Read-Only

- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `expanded_name` (String)
- `geographical_area` (List of String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `ref` (List of String)
- `version` (String)
